'''鈭歴h-v-ch''' ('''shavacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:richsplain|richsplain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:richsplain|richsplain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-v-ch
|-
! Lemma
| shavacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavachithi|shavachithi]] || [[word:shavachiji|shavachiji]] || [[word:shavachishi|shavachishi]] || [[word:shavachi|shavachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavachuthuth|shavachuthuth]] || [[word:shavachujuj|shavachujuj]] || [[word:shavachushush|shavachushush]] || [[word:shavach|shavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavachuthu|shavachuthu]] || [[word:shavachuju|shavachuju]] || [[word:shavachushu|shavachushu]] || [[word:shavachu|shavachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavachufuth|shavachufuth]] || [[word:shavachufuj|shavachufuj]] || [[word:shavachufush|shavachufush]] || [[word:shavachuf|shavachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavachethe|shavachethe]] || [[word:shavacheje|shavacheje]] || [[word:shavacheshe|shavacheshe]] || [[word:shavache|shavache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavachothoth|shavachothoth]] || [[word:shavachojoj|shavachojoj]] || [[word:shavachoshosh|shavachoshosh]] || [[word:shavach|shavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavachotho|shavachotho]] || [[word:shavachojo|shavachojo]] || [[word:shavachosho|shavachosho]] || [[word:shavacho|shavacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavachofoth|shavachofoth]] || [[word:shavachofoj|shavachofoj]] || [[word:shavachofosh|shavachofosh]] || [[word:shavachof|shavachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavach忙th忙|shavach忙th忙]] || [[word:shavach忙j忙|shavach忙j忙]] || [[word:shavach忙sh忙|shavach忙sh忙]] || [[word:shavach忙|shavach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavachathath|shavachathath]] || [[word:shavachajaj|shavachajaj]] || [[word:shavachashash|shavachashash]] || [[word:shavach|shavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavachatha|shavachatha]] || [[word:shavachaja|shavachaja]] || [[word:shavachasha|shavachasha]] || [[word:shavacha|shavacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavachafath|shavachafath]] || [[word:shavachafaj|shavachafaj]] || [[word:shavachafash|shavachafash]] || [[word:shavachaf|shavachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shavachasha|shavachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavachasha|goshavachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavachasha|gokishavachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shavachn眉sha|shavachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavachnkn眉sha|goshavachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavachn眉sha|gokishavachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavachsh毛sha|shavachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavachnksh毛sha|goshavachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavachsh毛sha|gokishavachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavachrosha|shavachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavachnkrosha|goshavachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavachrosha|gokishavachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavachmusha|shavachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavachnkmusha|goshavachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavachmusha|gokishavachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavachsherasha|shavachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavachnksherasha|goshavachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavachsherasha|gokishavachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavachngasha|shavachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavachnkngasha|goshavachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavachngasha|gokishavachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavachyasha|shavachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavachnkyasha|goshavachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavachyasha|gokishavachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavachyamasha|shavachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavachnkyamasha|goshavachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavachyamasha|gokishavachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavachn眉sh毛sha|shavachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavachnkn眉sh毛sha|goshavachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavachn眉sh毛sha|gokishavachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavachn眉rosha|shavachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavachnkn眉rosha|goshavachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavachn眉rosha|gokishavachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavachn眉musha|shavachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavachnkn眉musha|goshavachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavachn眉musha|gokishavachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavachsh毛n眉sha|shavachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavachnksh毛n眉sha|goshavachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavachsh毛n眉sha|gokishavachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavachsh毛rosha|shavachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavachnksh毛rosha|goshavachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavachsh毛rosha|gokishavachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavachsh毛musha|shavachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavachnksh毛musha|goshavachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavachsh毛musha|gokishavachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavachron眉sha|shavachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavachnkron眉sha|goshavachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavachron眉sha|gokishavachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavachrosh毛sha|shavachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavachnkrosh毛sha|goshavachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavachrosh毛sha|gokishavachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavachromusha|shavachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavachnkromusha|goshavachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavachromusha|gokishavachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavachmun眉sha|shavachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavachnkmun眉sha|goshavachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavachmun眉sha|gokishavachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavachmush毛sha|shavachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavachnkmush毛sha|goshavachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavachmush毛sha|gokishavachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavachmurosha|shavachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavachnkmurosha|goshavachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavachmurosha|gokishavachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shavach|shavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙v忙ch|sh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshavach|hoshavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙v忙ch|hosh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshavach|hohoshavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙v忙ch|hohosh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shavach|n眉shavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙v忙ch|n眉sh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shavach|n眉n眉shavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙v忙ch|n眉n眉sh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shavach|n茂shavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙v忙ch|n茂sh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shavach|n茂n茂shavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙v忙ch|n茂n茂sh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushavach|lushavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙v忙ch|lush忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushavach|lulushavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙v忙ch|lulush忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishavach|lishavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙v忙ch|lish忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishavach|lilishavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙v忙ch|lilish忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshavach|koshavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙v忙ch|kosh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshavach|kokoshavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙v忙ch|kokosh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshavach|keshavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙v忙ch|kesh忙v忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshavach|kekeshavach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙v忙ch|kekesh忙v忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
